task_description: Fix Vercel deployment failure by re-enabling static export in Next.js config and making the homepage compatible with static export (remove server-side data fetching, use client-side fetch instead).

verification.summary: Build succeeds with Next.js 16.2.6 Turbopack. All 27+ pages generated as static HTML in out/ directory. Zero serverless functions. No revalidate export remains. vercel.json rewrites intact for /api/* proxy to Render.
